items.name: Data-encryption-through-the-encoding-of-high-and-moderate-plaintext-information-blocks
items.description: A hybrid image encryption framework fusing machine learning and chaotic cryptography. It utilizes ML to classify image blocks by information density, enabling adaptive selective encryption. Combining bit-plane manipulation, chaotic maps, and multiple S-boxes, it optimizes speed and security for real-time IoT and resource-constrained environments.

items.name: PUREML-Machine-Learning-Toolkit-from-Scratch
items.description: PUREML is a custom machine learning library built entirely from scratch in Python. It focuses on implementing core machine learning algorithms and mathematical concepts without relying on external ML frameworks such as scikit-learn or TensorFlow.

items.name: Statistical-Model-Analysis
items.description: Repository for analyzing and using statistical Models. Includes rigorous derivations and implementation of Gamma-Log architectures, Fisher Scoring algorithms, and comprehensive model diagnostics (Deviance, Chi-Square, Residuals). Compares statistical inference frameworks against Machine Learning.

items.name: Empirical-analysis-of-machine-learning-methods-for-change-point-detection-in-financial-time-series.
